song.title: Since I Have Been Redeemed
song.author: Edwin O. Excell
song.lyrics:
[V1] . D A D A 1) I have a song I love to sing, Since I have been redeemed; . D A D G A D Of my Redeemer, Savior, King, Since I have been redeemed.
[C] . D A G D A D Chorus Since I have been redeemed, Since I have been redeemed, I will glory in His name; . D A G A D Since I have been redeemed, I will glory in my Savior’s name.
[V2] . D A D A 2) I have a Christ Who satisfies, Since I have been redeemed; . D A D G A D To do His will my highest prize, Since I have been redeemed.
[V3] . D A D A 3) I have a witness bright and clear, Since I have been redeemed; . D A D G A D Dispelling every doubt and fear, Since I have been redeemed.
[V4] . D A D A 4) I have a home prepared for me, Since I have been redeemed; . D A D G A D Where I shall dwell eternally, Since I have been redeemed.
